---
title: "pca_2"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-06-02"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{bash,eval=F}
#directory all files in 
cd /work/jyanglab/subhash/sorgsd/filterfed_vcf/0.pca/

#adds Chr as prefic (to extract common varaiats between SAP and SorGSD datsests)
awk '{ $1 = "Chr"$1; if ($2 == "." || $2 == "") $2 = $1"_"$4; print }' 289_dataset.bim > 289_dataset_fixed.bim289_dataset_fixed.bim
cp 289_dataset.bed 289_dataset_fixed.bed
cp 289_dataset.fam 289_dataset_fixed.fam
plink --bfile 289_dataset_fixed --make-bed --out 289_dataset_renamed --allow-extra-chr

#extracted all SNPS from 289 accessions(sorgsd)
cut -f2 289_dataset_renamed.bim > snps_A.txt

#extracted all snps from 400 accesions (SAP)
cut -f2 /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/9.gvcf_to_vcf/4.filtering/1.annotate/1.plink/1.stat_filter/1.het_filter/1.het_0.1_SAP.bim > snps_B.txt

#extracted common SNPS between the datsets
comm -12 <(sort snps_A.txt) <(sort snps_B.txt) > common_snps.txt

#ensure chromosomes have Chr01 insted of Chr1 
awk '{chr = $1;if (chr < 10) chr = "0" chr;$2 = "Chr" chr "_" $4;print}' 289_dataset.bim > 289_dataset_fixed2.bim
cp 289_dataset.bed 289_dataset_fixed2.bed
cp 289_dataset.fam 289_dataset_fixed2.fam
plink --bfile 289_dataset_fixed2 --make-bed --out 289_dataset_final --allow-extra-chr
cut -f2 289_dataset_final.bim > snps_A.txt
comm -12 <(sort snps_A.txt) <(sort snps_B.txt) > common_snps.txt

#subsetting both datsets based on common extrated SNPS and merging both datasets as one
plink --bfile 289_dataset_final --extract common_snps.txt --make-bed --out dataA_common --allow-extra-chr

plink --bfile /work/jyanglab/subhash/variant_calling/9.gvcf_to_vcf/4.filtering/1.annotate/1.plink/1.stat_filter/1.het_filter/1.het_0.1_SAP --extract common_snps.txt --make-bed --out dataB_common

plink --bfile dataA_common --bmerge dataB_common.bed dataB_common.bim dataB_common.fam --make-bed --out merged_data

#filtering for only bi allelic SNPs and removing multiallelic SNPs adn then merge them as I got error from plink for multiallelic
plink --bfile dataA_common --biallelic-only strict --make-bed --out dataA_common_biallelic
plink --bfile dataB_common --biallelic-only strict --make-bed --out dataB_common_biallelic

plink --bfile dataA_common_biallelic   --bmerge dataB_common_biallelic.bed dataB_common_biallelic.bim dataB_common_biallelic.fam   --make-bed --out merged_data
```




```{bash,eval=F}
#during the above merge gave an error
#used chat GPT to resolve issue
#flips the strand of mismatched SNPs in datasetB 
plink --bfile dataB_common_biallelic --flip merged_data-merge.missnp   --make-bed --out dataB_common_biallelic_flipped
#and then merging here
plink --bfile dataA_common_biallelic   --bmerge dataB_common_biallelic_flipped.bed dataB_common_biallelic_flipped.bim dataB_common_biallelic_flipped.fam   --make-bed --out merged_data_final
#got an error here so removed all problamatic SNPs and then merge
plink --bfile dataA_common_biallelic --exclude merged_data_final-merge.missnp   --make-bed --out dataA_cleaned
plink --bfile dataB_common_biallelic_flipped --exclude merged_data_final-merge.missnp   --make-bed --out dataB_cleaned
#merged datasets
plink --bfile dataA_cleaned   --bmerge dataB_cleaned.bed dataB_cleaned.bim dataB_cleaned.fam   --make-bed --out merged_data_cleaned
#final PCA
plink --bfile merged_data_cleaned --pca 10 --out merged_pca
```




```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)

# 1. Load new PCA result from merged dataset
merged_pca <- read.table("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Downloads/merged_pca.eigenvec", header = FALSE)
colnames(merged_pca) <- c("FID", "IID", paste0("PC", 1:10))

# 2. Load SAP metadata
sap_data <- read.csv("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Downloads/tpj15853-sup-0001-files1 (1).csv")[, c(1, 2, 5)]
colnames(sap_data) <- c("Pinumber", "cluster", "Country")

# Assign subpopulation names for SAP
sap_cluster_names <- c("1" = "durra", "2" = "kafir", "3" = "caudatum",
                       "4" = "milo/durra-bicolor", "5" = "mixed/bicolor", "6" = "guinea")
sap_data <- sap_data %>%
  mutate(cluster = as.character(cluster),
         ClusterName = sap_cluster_names[cluster],
         Set = "SAP") %>%
  filter(!is.na(ClusterName)) %>%
  select(Pinumber, ClusterName, Set)

# 3. Load SorGSD metadata
sorgsd_data <- read_excel("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Downloads/13068_2021_2016_MOESM1_ESM (1).xlsx")
colnames(sorgsd_data) <- sorgsd_data[1, ]
sorgsd_data <- sorgsd_data[-1, c(1, 6)]
colnames(sorgsd_data) <- c("Pinumber", "cluster")

# Clean and assign labels for SorGSD
sorgsd_data$cluster[sorgsd_data$cluster == "Weedy"] <- "Wild sorghum"
sorgsd_data <- sorgsd_data[sorgsd_data$cluster != "S.propinquum", ]
sorgsd_data <- sorgsd_data %>%
  mutate(ClusterName = case_when(
    cluster == "Improved" ~ "Improved",
    cluster == "Landrace" ~ "Landrace",
    cluster == "Wild sorghum" ~ "Wild sorghum",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  ),
  Set = "SorGSD") %>%
  filter(!is.na(ClusterName)) %>%
  select(Pinumber, ClusterName, Set)

# 4. Combine metadata from both sets
all_meta <- bind_rows(sap_data, sorgsd_data)

# 5. Merge metadata with PCA
pca_annotated <- inner_join(merged_pca, all_meta, by = c("IID" = "Pinumber"))

# 6. Define colors and shapes
shape_vec <- c("SorGSD" = 17, "SAP" = 16)
color_vec <- c(
  "Improved" = "#E41A1C", "Landrace" = "#377EB8", "Wild sorghum" = "#4DAF4A",
  "durra" = "#FF7F00", "kafir" = "#FFFF33", "caudatum" = "#984EA3",
  "milo/durra-bicolor" = "#F781BF", "mixed/bicolor" = "#A6A6A6", "guinea" = "#FF5733"
)

# 7. Plot
p <- ggplot(pca_annotated, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = ClusterName, shape = Set)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_vec) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_vec) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "PCA of Merged Sorghum Datasets", x = "PC1", y = "PC2", color = "Subpopulation", shape = "Dataset") +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

# Save plot
ggsave("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Documents/gwas_sap/profiling/graphs/pca_merged.pdf", plot = p, width = 8, height = 6)

```



```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# 1. Define shapes for domestication stages only
shape_vec <- c(
  "Improved" = 16,       # circle
  "Landrace" = 15,       # square
  "Wild sorghum" = 17    # triangle
)

# 2. Add new column for shape assignment
pca_annotated <- pca_annotated %>%
  mutate(shape_group = case_when(
    ClusterName %in% names(shape_vec) ~ ClusterName,
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  ))

# 3. Define color for all 9 clusters
color_vec <- c(
  "caudatum" = "#984EA3",
  "durra" = "#FF7F00",
  "guinea" = "#FF5733",
  "Improved" = "#E41A1C",
  "kafir" = "#FFFF33",
  "Landrace" = "#377EB8",
  "milo/durra-bicolor" = "#F781BF",
  "mixed/bicolor" = "#A6A6A6",
  "Wild sorghum" = "#4DAF4A"
)

# 4. Plot — layer-wise separation of shaped and non-shaped points
p <- ggplot() +
  # Non-shaped points (default shape)
  geom_point(data = filter(pca_annotated, is.na(shape_group)),
             aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = ClusterName),
             shape = 16, size = 2.8, alpha = 0.9) +
  # Shaped points (Improved, Landrace, Wild sorghum)
  geom_point(data = filter(pca_annotated, !is.na(shape_group)),
             aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = ClusterName, shape = shape_group),
             size = 3.5, alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_vec, guide = "none") +  # hide shape legend
  scale_color_manual(values = color_vec) +  # show all colors in legend
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "PCA of Merged Sorghum Datasets",
       x = "PC1", y = "PC2",
       color = "Subpopulation") +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

# 5. Save
ggsave("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Documents/gwas_sap/profiling/graphs/pca_final_clusters_shapes.pdf",plot = p, width = 8, height = 6)





library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Shape definitions
shape_vec <- c(
  "Improved" = 16,       # filled circle
  "Landrace" = 15,       # square
  "Wild sorghum" = 17    # triangle
)

# Add shape group
pca_annotated <- pca_annotated %>%
  mutate(shape_group = case_when(
    ClusterName %in% names(shape_vec) ~ ClusterName,
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  ))

# Color map for all 9 subpopulations
color_vec <- c("durra" = "green", "kafir" = "orange", "caudatum" = "purple", 
                    "milo/durra-bicolor" = "gold", "mixed/bicolor" = "brown", "guinea" = "red", 
                    "Improved" = "lightpink", "Wild sorghum" = "navy", "Landrace" = "blue")



# Plot
p <- ggplot() +
  # Layer 1: unshaped points (default round shape)
  geom_point(
    data = filter(pca_annotated, is.na(shape_group)),
    aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = ClusterName),
    shape = 16, size = 2.4, alpha = 0.7, position = position_jitter(width = 0.0008, height = 0.0008)
  ) +
  # Layer 2: shaped points (Improved, Landrace, Wild sorghum)
  geom_point(
    data = filter(pca_annotated, !is.na(shape_group)),
    aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = ClusterName, shape = shape_group),
    size = 3.6, alpha = 0.9, position = position_jitter(width = 0.0008, height = 0.0008)
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = shape_vec, name = "Domestication Stage") +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_vec) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "PCA of Merged Sorghum Datasets",
    x = "PC1", y = "PC2",
    color = "Subpopulation"
  ) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
p + scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-0.05, 0.05))  # You can tweak these values

# Save
ggsave("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Documents/gwas_sap/graphs/pca_final_clear.pdf",
       plot = p, width = 8.5, height = 6.2)

nrow(pca_annotated)
table(pca_annotated$ClusterName)
```




































```{bash}
ml plink
plink --vcf /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/2.289_sorgsd/SorGSD.289snp.miss05.AGPV5.vcf --make-bed --out SorGSD.289snp.miss05.unimp

awk '{print $1, $4}' /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/2.289_sorgsd/PLINK_un_imputed/SorGSD.289snp.miss05.unimp.bim > /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/2.289_sorgsd/PLINK_un_imputed/SorGSD.289snp.chr_pos.txt
sort /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/2.289_sorgsd/PLINK_un_imputed/SorGSD.289snp.chr_pos.txt > /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/2.289_sorgsd/PLINK_un_imputed/SorGSD.289snp.chr_pos_sorted.txt

awk '{print $1, $4}' /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/1.SAP_SNPs/2.filtered_vcf/1.het_0.1_SAP.bim > /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/1.SAP_SNPs/2.filtered_vcf/1.het_0.1_SAP_pos.txt
sort /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/1.SAP_SNPs/2.filtered_vcf/1.het_0.1_SAP_pos.txt > /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/1.SAP_SNPs/2.filtered_vcf/1.het_0.1_SAP_pos_sorted.txt

comm -12 /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/2.289_sorgsd/PLINK_un_imputed/SorGSD.289snp.chr_pos_sorted.txt /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/1.SAP_SNPs/2.filtered_vcf/1.het_0.1_SAP_pos_sorted.txt > common_chr_pos.txt
#sort /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/2.289_sorgsd/PLINK_un_imputed/common_chr_pos.txt > /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/2.289_sorgsd/PLINK_un_imputed/common_chr_pos_sorted.txt


cd /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/2.289_sorgsd/PLINK_un_imputed
awk 'NR==FNR {a[$1"_"$2]; next} ($1"_"$4) in a {print $2}'   OFS="_" common_chr_pos.txt SorGSD.289snp.miss05.unimp.bim > SorGSD.289snp_common.txt


cd /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/1.SAP_SNPs/2.filtered_vcf
awk 'NR==FNR {a[$1"_"$2]; next} ($1"_"$4) in a {print $2}'   OFS="_" /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/2.289_sorgsd/PLINK_un_imputed/common_chr_pos.txt 1.het_0.1_SAP.bim > 1.het_0.1_SAP_common.txt


cd /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/1.SAP_SNPs/2.filtered_vcf
ml plink
plink --bfile 1.het_0.1_SAP --extract 1.het_0.1_SAP_common.txt --make-bed --out pca/SAP_pca_common

cd /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/2.289_sorgsd/PLINK_un_imputed
plink --bfile SorGSD.289snp.miss05.unimp --extract SorGSD.289snp_common.txt --make-bed --out pca/SorGSD.289snp_common


plink --bfile /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/1.SAP_SNPs/2.filtered_vcf/pca/SAP_pca_common --bmerge /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/2.289_sorgsd/PLINK_un_imputed/pca/SorGSD.289snp_common.bed /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/2.289_sorgsd/PLINK_un_imputed/pca/SorGSD.289snp_common.bim /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/2.289_sorgsd/PLINK_un_imputed/pca/SorGSD.289snp_common.fam --make-bed --out /mnt/nrdstor/jyanglab/subhash/datasets/pca_common/merged_for_pca






```
